title: Baffling Nature: The Bermuda Triangle

scenes.text: A region where ships and planes mysteriously vanish.
The Bermuda Triangle lies between Miami, Bermuda, and Puerto Rico.
Numerous vessels and aircraft have disappeared without explanation since the 19th century.
It remains a popular topic of speculation and investigation.
Scientific explanations exist, but many remain unsatisfied.
scenes.label: WHY THE MYSTERY?

description: 📍 Bermuda Triangle - N/A. A notorious area where ships and planes have vanished without a trace, raising questions for over a century. Follow for daily mysteries!
